lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: H-hi.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: Me? I'm Wonny. Just a lonely werewolf keeping to himself. I mean no twouble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You sound awfully afraid for a werewolf...

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: I know... My fwiend dared me to come down here. Said I wasn't bwave enough. He was wight...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, you're a werewolf?

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: Yes, I'm a cowardly dog, alwight! My fwiends call me Stwong Wonny as a joke. It isn't weally funny though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Couldn't you turn into a wolf if you're scared?

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: Well, that's the thing.

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: I can't twust myself. I have a hunger that I stwuggle to contwol once twansformed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh, I wasn't aware werewolves had a conscience.

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: Well that's pwetty wude. I twy to be an upstanding citizen... Only a little killing! And only if they deserve it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, don't worry, I'm a massive hypocrite.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here?

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: I only planned to look awound, but I got all lost and found myself face to face with a demon. I wan and wan and stopped here for a dwink but it's too dirty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not the demon woman back yonder? I suppose she looks pretty vicious, but she seems alright.

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: I know her type. One of them hangs out near Canifis and he's always boasting about being the only demon in Mowytania as the others all wan away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm sure she's harmless. If you go back that way you should see a group of men in red cloaks. Head past them and you're back in the cave that will lead you to the surface.

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: Thanks for the diwections, I'll west here a little longer though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: Wait, don't go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've places to be...

lines.speaker: Strong Ronny
lines.text: Oh, okay then.
